structured_payload_candidate.title: Fan Alarm (Commanded Off, Status On)
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel fan-powered terminal unit, constant-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Generate a Level 4 alarm if fan is commanded off but status is on after 15 seconds.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Fan commanded off AND status on for 15 seconds after change in output status
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Commanded off, status on after 15 seconds
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Fan alarm is indicated by the status input being different from the output command after a period of 15 seconds after a change in output status.
b. Commanded off, status on: Level 4
